Book a demo
Supercharge your teamwork
The most secure and easy to use platform for
messaging, video calling, and task management.
Try it for free
Contact Sales
based on 1000+ reviews
Over 75,000 companies use Chanty to be more productive
Voice and video calls
Meet more efficiently with video conferencing
It’s easier to see things eye-to-eye when you’re face-to-face. Video conferencing helps you share information more efficiently, so work gets done faster.
Chanty call features
Join anywhere, on any device
With Chanty, you can start or join a call from anywhere. Go from typing messages to making a video call with the click of a button.
Present and discuss
While in a video conference, you can show what you’re working on by sharing your screen or let someone else share theirs.
4k video and audio
Bring 4k video and audio to your meetings with support for up to 1000 video participants and 49 videos on screen.
Tasks management
Create and manage tasks to stay productive
Create new tasks from scratch or turn any message into a task to enjoy a smarter collaboration with your deadline-driven team.
Chanty tasks management features
Kanban view
It’s essentially a way to view tasks in rows and columns, similar to what you would find in today’s popular project management tools.
Discuss tasks
Discuss the task in its related channel, creating a workflow centered around that specific task.
Set due date
With Chanty due date feature you will always be notified about a deadline. Control the status and priority for any task.
Seamless integrations
with your favorite software
Getting started is easy since workflows are integrated with apps your team members are already working with.
Explore integrations
Super easy to start.
Simply enter your email.
Free Sign up
Please, enter a valid email
4.9/
5
4.7/

This is what they have to say about us
Chanty
Windows, iOS, Mac OS, Android, Linux
Chanty
Team Communication and Collaboration Software.
Collaboration software
5
5
Josh Arnold
We have hundreds of members and volunteers who need to connect and collaborate daily. It would be impossible to expect everyone to share their cell phone numbers with one another or try to use email. An instant and group messaging platform where conversations can be organized in different threads is the best solution for meeting our collaboration goals.
								Our members utilize Chanty for practical purposes like asking for help with a tool, providing feedback, scheduling meetups, etc. but also for more social purposes like sharing pictures of their latest projects.
								We find Chanty’s user-interface to be far more user friendly than their competitors like Slack or Microsoft Teams. We have also found Chanty’s support to be very helpful and responsive.
Melinda Self
We like the document attachment feature so we can share briefs and procedures. I even get the posts on my Apple watch, which is great if I’m in a meeting and want to take a quick peek to see if something urgent has come up. Our work is hard and using GIFs makes it much more pleasurable.
Jacob Hopson
“We value Chanty because of the ability to have all work related conversations in one place. We also enjoy being able to send files back and forth. Being able to access Chanty from anywhere is a huge advantage if one of us has an urgent issue we need feedback on.”
Fabian Krieger
“Thanks, you are my new BFF... Making Chanty more fun and better than Slack! I'll support you guys all the way :)”
Julia Dadds
“I like the simplicity of the platform and yet it has the major features we need.”
David Oragui
“Seems like you've got a great product. The UI is amazing, please keep up the good work.”
Tu Bui
“We certainly love the simple interface and the chats, tasks, files and links are put together in an easy way to use”
Amilcar De Carvalho
“Slack was too slow for my phone, and didn't have audio messages, which is crucial for me as I enjoy working while walking with my dog in nature and Microsoft was too complex to use. Finally no more whatsapp for communications and audio messages, which makes us extremely focused.”
We have hundreds of members and volunteers who need to connect and collaborate daily. It would be impossible to expect everyone to share their cell phone numbers with one another or try to use email. An instant and group messaging platform where conversations can be organized in different threads is the best solution for meeting our collaboration goals.
Our members utilize Chanty for practical purposes like asking for help with a tool, providing feedback, scheduling meetups, etc. but also for more social purposes like sharing pictures of their latest projects.
We find Chanty’s user-interface to be far more user friendly than their competitors like Slack or Microsoft Teams. We have also found Chanty’s support to be very helpful and responsive.
Josh Arnold
Executive Director, Mission Circle Facilitator, Management Circle Operational Leader
I like the simplicity of the platform and yet it has the major features we need.
Julia Dadds
Pyramid Coaches
We like the document attachment feature so we can share briefs and procedures. I even get the posts on my Apple watch, which is great if I’m in a meeting and want to take a quick peek to see if something urgent has come up. Our work is hard and using GIFs makes it much more pleasurable.
Melinda Self
Director at Contra Costa County Department of Child Support Services
We certainly love the simple interface and the chats, tasks, files and links are put together in an easy way to use
Tu Bui
Ringier
Slack was too slow for my phone, and didn't have audio messages, which is crucial for me as I enjoy working while walking with my dog in nature and Microsoft was too complex to use. Finally no more whatsapp for communications and audio messages, which makes us extremely focused.
Amilcar De Carvalho
Creative Director at Battalion Media
Thanks, you are my new BFF... Making Chanty more fun and better than Slack! I'll support you guys all the way :)
Fabian Krieger
Hoogdesign
Seems like you've got a great product. The UI is amazing, please keep up the good work.
David Oragui
Grow Hack Scale
We value Chanty because of the ability to have all work related conversations in one place. We also enjoy being able to send files back and forth. Being able to access Chanty from anywhere is a huge advantage if one of us has an urgent issue we need feedback on.
Jacob Hopson
Landman at Rain Oil & Gas LLC
Chanty awards
95% of users saw a significant  boost in employee engagement after switching to Chanty
Book a demo
Enterprise-grade data protection
Trust Chanty to keep your data secure and meet your compliance requirements.
Own Your Data
Your data belongs to you. End of story. All the messages you send are not only safely transferred and stored, but they are also protected against compliance-related exports.
Zero Moderation
No Big Brother is watching you means that no one has direct access to your databases or messages in Chanty.
EU General Data Protection Regulation
Chanty respects your privacy and helps you understand your rights according to the General Data Protection Regulation, which took effect on May 25, 2018.
Encrypted Transactions
Chanty forces HTTPS using TLS (SSL), for all services including our public website. Web connections to all Chanty services are via TLS 1.2 and above.
Exceptional care
For your data guaranteed by
international compliance.

ISO 9001

Rated 4.9/5 based on 100+ user reviews
Frequently Asked Questions
What will my Chanty subscription cost?
Chanty charges
$3 per user
billed
annually
or
$4 per user
billed on a
monthly
basis.
For example, you run a team of up to 5 people. You can use our Free plan or upgrade to a Business plan to unlock conference calls with three and more participants, screen-sharing, unlimited integrations, more storage, and get 99.9% guaranteed uptime and priority support.
Once you upgrade 5 people to a Business plan, your 1-year subscription will cost $180 billed annually or $240 ($20 per month) if you choose to pay monthly.
Now, let's say you have 6 people on your team. Your 1-year subscription will cost $216 billed annually or $288 ($24 per month) if you choose to pay on a monthly basis.
Contact our sales team
for more information.
What payment methods do we accept?
You can use your credit card to pay for any plan. If you sign up for an Annual subscription, we can invoice you annually.
Contact us
to start the process.
How to Upgrade?
Check our Upgrade guide for more information.
https://www.chanty.com/help/article/upgrade-to-business-plan/
How Guest users are charged?
Single-conversation Guests can only access one conversation. Free Plan allows inviting only one Guest to a single conversation.
Upgrading to the Business plan will give you the ability to add up to 3 Guests per 1 paid seat for free.
For example, you can have 10 paid seats on a Business plan and invite up to 30 single-conversation Guests for free.
Can I try Chanty Business with a discount or free?
Chanty grants a 50% discount for registered nonprofit organizations.
Create a
team space
and
contact us
for the further steps.
What happens if I am not satisfied with my Chanty subscription?
If you're not satisfied with the Chanty product or service, we offer a 14-day money-back guarantee after the first billing transaction. No questions asked.
Have more questions?
Contact our sales team
and we'll be happy to help.
Super easy to start.
Simply enter your email.
Free Sign up
Please, enter a valid email
We are always ready to help
Got a question? Our 24/7
support team
will go the extra mile for you to have an easy and enjoyable experience with Chanty.

analysis.name: Chanty
analysis.value_proposition: A secure, easy-to-use team communication platform combining messaging, video calls, and built-in task management as a Slack/Teams alternative.
analysis.ideal_customer: Small-to-mid-size teams and non-desk workforces (healthcare, retail, education, logistics, property management, realtors, restaurants) seeking a simpler, cheaper alternative to Slack/Teams

features.name: public and private channels
features.description: Unlimited public and private chats/channels for team conversations

features.name: announcement channels
features.description: Unlimited announcement-only channels for critical comms

features.name: voice messages
features.description: Unlimited async voice messages

features.description: Schedule messages to send later

features.description: Ephemeral messages that auto-delete

features.name: nonprofit and education discount
features.description: 50% discount for nonprofits and education

differentiators: Simpler UI than Slack and Microsoft Teams
All-in-one: chat, calls, and built-in task manager in one place
Teambook central hub for organizing conversations, tasks, files, and links
Voice messages as first-class async communication
Kanban task view built into the chat client
Chanty for Communities and on-premise deployment options

praised: 'We find Chanty's user-interface to be far more user friendly than their competitors like Slack or Microsoft Teams'
'Chanty's support to be very helpful and responsive'
'the simplicity of the platform and yet it has the major features we need'
'the chats, tasks, files and links are put together in an easy way to use'
Voice/audio messages praised as unique vs Slack ('Slack ... didn't have audio messages, which is crucial for me')
Apple Watch notifications appreciated for mobile use
complaints: No public G2/HN complaints extracted from available sources (G2 page returned no reviews content; HN results were unrelated to the product)

free_tier.limits: Up to 5 team members, 1 guest + 1 multi-conversation guest, 20GB team file storage, up to 10 integrations, community support

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: Unlimited chats/channels/history, 1:1 calls, built-in tasks, 20GB team storage, up to 5 users

tiers.name: Business
tiers.headline_inclusions: Group calls, screen share, task boards, SSO/2FA, HIPAA, 20GB/user, 24x7 support, 99.9% SLA

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: White label, SAML/SCIM, analytics, on-prem, data residency, DLP, dedicated CSM & SLA

pricing.notes: Business is $3/user/month; annual and monthly billing options offered (annual discount implied by 'Save $44.04 / annually' calculator but exact % not stated). 50% discount for nonprofits and education. Separate Chanty onPremise quote-based offering. White-labeling & embedding available as inquiry-based add-on. Free plan hard-capped at 5 team members.
